title: uragoga macrocalyx
intro: Uragoga macrocalyx, also known as the 'Long-tailed Uragoga', is a plant species in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to tropical regions of West Africa and has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Uragoga macrocalyx include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid and anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Uragoga macrocalyx typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
